title: ROCKIT LLM Output
description: Output schema for ROCKIT market analysis. Shared by training pair generation and live inference. Sections not yet active based on current_et_time should use 'NA — [reason]' strings.

thinking.description: Step-by-step reasoning chain. Each step must reference specific snapshot data with actual numbers.

step_1_context.description: Where are we relative to prior value? Reference gap_status, overnight range, prior VA, compression_flag.

step_2_structure.description: IB read: reference ib_range, ib_width_class, ib_atr_ratio, extension_pts/direction/multiple. 'NA — IB not yet formed' before 9:30.

step_3_flow.description: Order flow: reference dpoc_regime, net_migration_pts, avg_velocity, accelerating/decelerating, tpo fattening_zone. Explain what the regime means. 'NA — awaiting IB completion' before 10:30.

step_4_levels.description: Key levels in play: name 2-3 nearest levels with exact price and distance from current_close. Include HVN/LVN nodes if near price.

step_5_day_type.description: Day type evidence: reference inference.day_type.type AND explain WHY with 3-4 bullets linking snapshot data to the classification definition. 'NA — IB not complete' before 10:30.

step_6_setups.description: Active/potential setups: check or_reversal.signal, edge_fade.signal, balance_classification.playbook_action, mean_reversion.trade_setup_*. Cite backtest WR/PF for each. 'NA — IB not complete' before 10:30.

step_7_risk.description: Risk check: CRI overall_status + which component scores drove it (terrain, breath, reclaim, trap). Position sizing recommendation. What invalidates the thesis. 'NA — CRI not computed' before 10:30.

premarket_read.description: Opening context: inside/above/below prior VA (VAH/VAL prices), overnight range, compression status, nearest 2-3 levels with distance. Always active.

or_play.description: Opening range assessment: OR Reversal signal status (64.4% WR if LONG/SHORT), sweep detection, drive classification, OR Acceptance status. 'NA — pre-market' before 9:30.

ib_read.description: IB interpretation: range pts, width_class vs ATR ratio, inside/outside prior VA, day type probability implication. For partial IB, note what's developing. 'NA — OR still forming' before 10:00.

day_type_call.description: Day type analysis with evidence chain and skew assessment.

classification.description: Day type FROM inference.day_type.type (reference only, never override). One of: Trend Up, Trend Down, Open Drive, Open Auction, Double Distribution, Neutral Range, Balance.

evidence.description: Evidence bullets citing specific snapshot data. Must include: DPOC regime bullet, 30/60-min TPO acceptance check, trend strength (if Trend day), balance fade oath (if Balance/Neutral Range).

confidence_breakdown.description: Explain inference.confidence score: which factors pushed it up/down. E.g., 'IB acceptance +15%, Weak trend cap -25%, DPOC fading -10% = 55%. Moderate conviction, half size.'

skew.description: For Balance/Neutral Range: reference balance_classification.skew (bullish/bearish/neutral) + skew_strength + seam_level. For Trend days: 'N/A — trend day'.

morph_watch.description: Reference balance_classification.morph.status and inference.day_type_morph. What level + time confirms/denies a morph.

strategy_assessment.description: Assessment of all active/relevant strategy signals from the snapshot.

or_reversal.description: or_reversal.signal status + quality assessment if active. Cite 64.4% WR, 2.96 PF. 'Outside window' if past 10:15.

or_acceptance.description: 3×5-min acceptance above/below OR — is this developing or confirmed? Cite 59.9% WR, 1.46 PF.

eighty_percent.description: 80P Rule: Is price outside prior VA and accepting back? Reference VA width, 50% depth target. Cite 42.3% WR, 1.74 PF. 'No entry after 13:00'.

twenty_percent.description: 20P IB Extension: Is IB extension developing? 3×5-min acceptance outside IB extreme? Reference extension_pts and direction.

b_day.description: B-Day IBL Fade: Is balance_classification showing b-type? 30-bar acceptance inside IB? VWAP vs IB mid? Cite 46.4% WR, 1.47 PF.

edge_fade.description: edge_fade.signal status. IB edge rejection pattern? Active 10:00-13:30 only.

mean_reversion.description: mean_reversion setup status. WARNING: 42.6% WR, 0.91 PF — LOSING strategy. Flag unreliable.

value_area_play.description: 80P/20P/rotation assessment: where is price vs prior VA? Acceptance status. If 80P in play, cite target at 50% VA depth. 'NA — IB not complete' before 10:30.

tpo_remarks.description: Profile shape interpretation: fattening location (bullish/bearish acceptance), single prints (rejection), DPOC migration narrative, extreme/compression status. 'NA — insufficient TPO data' before 10:00.

evolution.description: Session evolution tracking: Is bias strengthening or weakening? DPOC accelerating or decelerating? Confidence rising or falling? CRI improving or degrading? Which strategy windows just opened/closed? 'NA — first snapshot' for earliest reading.

evidence.description: 3-5 specific observations grounded in snapshot data with exact numbers. Strategy references must include backtest WR/PF.

what_could_go_wrong.description: Failure scenarios with specific trigger conditions and levels.

one_liner.description: High-conviction trader voice: day type + strength + key action + primary level. Include strength note (e.g., 'Moderate Trend Up on 30-min hold + 0.7x extension = Bullish pyramid'). Max ~25 words.

discipline.description: Position size recommendation (Lanto model + CRI permission), risk reminder, after-13:00 cutoff if applicable. E.g., 'CRI PROBE_ONLY: 2 MNQ max. Weak trend = scalp only. One loss today — next loss = done.'
